description: If a player plays a card with value 9 or 10, they receive an additional 3 points.

replay.mechanic_description: If a player plays a card with value 9 or 10, they receive an additional 3 points.

description: If a player plays a card with value 1, they can choose to discard another card from their hand to gain 5 points.

replay.mechanic_description: If a player plays a card with value 1, they can choose to discard another card from their hand to gain 5 points.

description: If a player's score exactly reaches 45 points after playing a card, they receive an additional 5 points.

replay.mechanic_description: If a player's score exactly reaches 45 points after playing a card, they receive an additional 5 points.

description: If a player plays a card with a value of 9 or 10, they immediately get an extra turn.

replay.mechanic_description: If a player plays a card with a value of 9 or 10, they immediately get an extra turn.

description: If a player plays a card with a value of 1 or 2, their opponent's score is increased by 3 points.

replay.mechanic_description: If a player plays a card with a value of 1 or 2, their opponent's score is increased by 3 points.

description: If a player plays a card that has the same value as the opponent's last played card, the current player steals that card's value from the opponent's score and adds it to their own score.

replay.mechanic_description: If a player plays a card that has the same value as the opponent's last played card, the current player steals that card's value from the opponent's score and adds it to their own score.

description: If a player plays a prime number card (2, 3, 5, 7), the value of that card is doubled for scoring purposes.

replay.mechanic_description: If a player plays a prime number card (2, 3, 5, 7), the value of that card is doubled for scoring purposes.

description: If the card played is a multiple of 5 (5 or 10), the player draws an additional card to their hand.

replay.mechanic_description: If the card played is a multiple of 5 (5 or 10), the player draws an additional card to their hand.

description: If a player's score lands exactly on 15, 30, or 45, they receive an extra turn and 7 bonus points.

replay.mechanic_description: If a player's score lands exactly on 15, 30, or 45, they receive an extra turn and 7 bonus points.

description: If a player plays a card with a value of 9 or 10, their opponent receives 3 bonus points.
